ca-1-explicit-scheduling.reason: p25 of 10-run variance analysis under Opus judge. Strong feature performance; Opus consistently scores 9-10.

ca-2-not-scheduling.reason: Deterministic 10 across 10 runs under Opus. The judge has no ambiguity on negative-case scheduling detection.

ca-3-ambiguous-time.reason: Deterministic 9 across 10 runs under Opus. Opus mechanically lands on 9 for the borderline 'let's catch up sometime' case.
